backend.network: Unable to reach the GitNexus server. Make sure `gitnexus serve` is running.

backend.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in {{seconds}}s.

backend.originBlocked: This action isn't available from the hosted UI. Open GitNexus from the server's own address (e.g. http://localhost:4747) to continue.
